name: Project Fear
overview:
After the devastating cancellation of their hit show, "Destination Fear", Dakota, Chelsea, Tanner, and Alex rule out the option of ending their terrifying road trips and continue their paranormal investigations by uncovering some of the most haunted places in all of America and the world.

On their YouTube channel they create haunted road trips, exploration videos, and go ghost hunting. They will be surviving abandoned asylums, USA's most haunted hotels, the real conjuring house, and The Stanley Hotel.  Dakota Laden, Chelsea Laden, Tanner Wiseman, and Alex Schroeder have been on the TV Show Destination Fear, Ghost Adventures, and Ghost Hunters. Watch Their scary content and demonic encounters. Subscribe to travel with them and explore the paranormal!

trailers.title: The Terrifying Trip We'll Never Forget | Official Trailer
